policiesPage.title: Policies
policiesPage.subtitle: Configure validation and enforcement rules for this workspace (Team and Business).

home.taglineSub: Document, share and track the architectural choices that matter.
home.feature1Desc: Record the context, options considered and consequences of each technical decision.
home.feature2Desc: Group decisions by project and keep everything tidy and accessible.
home.feature3Desc: Collaborate with your team and keep everyone aligned on the choices made.

hero.headline: Your decisions. Enforced in every PR.
hero.subheadline: Document what your team decided, link it to a PR, and let the gate check every code change against the decision — blocking what doesn't fit.
hero.ctaMicrocopy:
Free forever on observation mode.

No credit card.

value.title:
Decisions get documented.

Code still drifts.
value.subtitle: The gap is not documentation — it's enforcement at merge time.
value.pain1: A PR adds a service layer nobody agreed on. Review misses it. It ships.
value.pain2: You deprecate a pattern. Next sprint, AI brings it back.
value.pain3: Three teams, three interpretations of the same decision.
value.gain1: Every high-impact PR is checked against the approved decision scope.
value.gain2: Tech leads set guardrails once — no more repeating rules in review.
value.gain3: Teams keep velocity and architecture stays consistent.

solution.title:
Four steps.

Two minutes to set up.
solution.subtitle: Record the decision, link it to a PR, and let the gate do the rest.
solution.flowStep1Desc: Document context, options, and the decision. Generate from notes with AI or write manually.
solution.flowStep2Desc: Reference the decision in the PR. The pipeline knows which rules apply.
solution.flowStep3Desc: Gate runs in CI. Checks the decision exists and is approved.
solution.flowStep4Desc: The LLM Judge compares the diff to the decision. Out of scope? Blocked with a clear reason.

buyers.title: One tool, four outcomes
buyers.b1Pain: Wants speed across squads without architecture going sideways.
buyers.b1Outcome: Guardrails that scale without manual policing.
buyers.b2Pain: Tired of repeating the same architectural rules in every review.
buyers.b2Outcome: Decisions enforced in CI, not stuck in someone's head.
buyers.b3Pain: Needs enforcement that doesn't add process friction.
buyers.b3Outcome: One CI step. Same workflow. Measurable compliance.
buyers.b4Pain: Needs traceability between decisions and production changes.
buyers.b4Outcome: Clear audit trail: what was decided, what was merged.

trust.title: Your model. Your keys. Your rules.
trust.intro: Decern runs on the LLM provider you choose. Keys are used per-request, never stored. You control enforcement mode and confidence threshold per workspace.
trust.t1Desc: OpenAI, Claude, or any OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Your API key, your budget, your latency profile.
trust.t2Desc: Start in report-only mode on the Free plan. Enable blocking on Team or Business when the team is aligned.
trust.t3Desc: Every gate run produces a decision reference, scope verdict, and reason code. Ready for review and compliance.

features.title: Three things<mbr></mbr> the gate does
features.feat1Title: LLM Judge in your CI pipeline
features.feat1Desc: The Judge reads the decision and the PR diff. If the change goes beyond scope, the gate blocks with a clear, actionable reason.
features.feat2Desc: The Judge returns a score (0–100%). Set a threshold per workspace. Know exactly how well each change aligns before it merges.
features.feat3Desc: On Free, the gate reports but never blocks. Try it on real PRs with zero risk to your pipeline. No time limit.

pricingTeaser.title: Start free. Unlock blocking when ready.
pricingTeaser.freeDesc: Observation mode, unlimited checks, AI generation. Validate value with zero risk.
pricingTeaser.teamDesc: Blocking mode, confidence thresholds, and controls for growing teams.
pricingTeaser.businessDesc: Multi-workspace management, advanced policies, and roles.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: How is this different from Confluence, Notion, or ADRs in Markdown?
faq.a1: Those tools store documents. They don't enforce them. Decern links decisions to PRs and checks them in CI. If a PR breaks a decision, the pipeline blocks or flags it. You also get a structured log you can search and report on.
faq.q2: Does the AI write the decisions for us?
faq.a2: You can use AI to draft a decision from meeting notes. A human reviews and approves. Decern enforces what humans decided — it doesn't replace decision-making.
faq.q3: Won't this add bureaucracy or block us too often?
faq.a3: One link in the PR, one step in CI. You choose: block (strict) or report only (observation). On Free we only report, so you can try it risk-free.
faq.q4: Do we need to change our GitHub or GitLab workflow?
faq.a4: No. Add one step in CI (npx decern-gate) and reference the decision in the PR. Your process stays the same.

cta.title:
Stop drift before it ships.

Start in two minutes.
cta.subline:

Every change checked against what you decided.
cta.microcopy:

No credit card required.

decisions.createFirstProject: To create decisions, you must first create at least one project.
decisions.newSubtitle: Generate the decision with AI by pasting text or enter it manually.
decisions.copySubtitle: Fields prefilled from the selected decision. Edit and save to create the new decision.
decisions.noDecisionsCreate: No decisions. Create one to get started.
decisions.noResultsFilters: No results with the selected filters. Try changing search or tags.
decisions.titlePlaceholder: e.g. Adopt Next.js as frontend framework
decisions.contextPlaceholder: Describe the problem or situation that led to this decision...

decisions.noOptions: No options. Click "Add option" to list the alternatives considered.
decisions.consequencesPlaceholder: Describe the positive and negative consequences of this decision...
decisions.tagHint: Type and choose from suggestions or press Enter to add.

decisions.noLinks: No links. Click "Add link" to add external references (RFC, docs, etc.).

workspace.title: Workspace
workspace.subtitle: Manage members and invitations. Invited users will see all projects in the workspace.
workspace.createHint: With the Business plan you can create multiple workspaces to organize teams and projects.
workspace.upgradeForWorkspaces: To create more workspaces, upgrade to the
workspace.membersHint: Users invited to the workspace will see all projects. Manage invites and members here.
workspace.inviteUser: Invite a user to the workspace
workspace.inviteHint: Enter the email and share the link (valid 7 days). The invitee will see all projects in the workspace.
workspace.policiesSectionSubtitle: Decision Gate policies for CI. Query params on the gate override these when provided.
workspace.highImpactHint: When on, the gate blocks CI if a high-impact change (e.g. migrations, infra, CI configs) is not backed by a valid decision. When off, high-impact changes are reported but never block the pipeline (observation mode).
workspace.requireLinkedPRHint: Decision must have at least one linked PR to pass validation.
workspace.requireApprovedHint: Decision must be approved to pass validation.
workspace.judgeBlockingHint: When on, the LLM judge can block the gate (Team and Business); when off, judge is advisory only.
workspace.confirmLeaveWorkspace: Do you want to leave the workspace?
workspace.inviteLinkDescription: Share this link with the invitee (valid 7 days). If they don't have an account yet, opening the link will take them to registration with this email; after confirmation they'll see all workspace projects.
workspace.yourWorkspacesHint: Select a workspace from the sidebar to see its projects. You can rename the ones you own.
workspace.ciTokenDescription: Use this token in CI pipelines to verify that a decision is approved before proceeding.
workspace.confirmRevokeCiToken: Revoke CI token? You'll need to generate a new one to use the Decision Gate.
workspace.tokenGenerated: Token generated: copy it now, it won't be visible again.
